channel.title: Chad Fink's Blog
channel.description: Recent content on Chad Fink's Blog

item.description:
ca inx - Intouch Insight ltd *

  • Revenue has been growing slowly.  Company has been profitable. debt free with 2.5m cash on balance sheet
  • High gross margin business
  • insider buying from numerous insiders
  • 97% customer retention rate. 97%+ recurring revenue
  • Expect 2018 rev to be 15m. q1 was 3.57, so this seems likely
  • spending alot on product dev, sales and marketing for LiaCX which launched may 1. They do not expect to see significant revenue from the new product line until 2019
  • several insiders own just under 10% individually
  • almost all revenue is recurring
  • plans to invest 5m into the cem product in 2018 and an additional 6-7m investment in 2019
  • Would not be surprised if 2019 delivers losses as well. This is ok as long as LiaCX is gaining market traction and is in line with the companies long term vision.
  • Company is excited about LiaCX and this is backed by the insider purchasing

Daso 21.76 cd 2.5 tev 7.29. Cash will likely come down as spending increases throughout the year. Buy at .45*

item.title: Welcome
item.description:
This blog is ready to publish.

Create your next post with:

./scripts/new-post.sh "Your post title"

When it’s ready, set draft: false and push to GitHub.
